title: Conditional join + preload with shared binding
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.search_with_optional_preloads/1` that takes opts with `:include_author` and `:include_category` booleans. Start from `from(p in Post, as: :post)`. If `:include_author` is true, join author `as: :author` + thread into preload. If `:include_category` is true, join category `as: :category` + thread into preload. Both can be set, either can be set, neither can be set. Return the queryable. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Conditional joins + threaded preloads — two optional branches where the preload ONLY works if the join was added. Fragile composition.
